speaker: MATT
raw_text: 15, okay. Scanlan, I need you to roll a wisdom saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to nock an arrow. And point it towards the violin and hold it there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Percy, you creep closer. As you get closer, the music gets louder.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But you have stuff in your ears.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I have packed my ears.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You have, and as you approach, it doesn't seem to have an effect on the volume of the music.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm backing up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Make an intelligence check. Add your intelligence modifier.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Please roll good.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You begin to notice the increasing volume despite the blockage in the ear pretty early on and stop your advancement before you get too close.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I sit. I pull out Bad News and I start to get a good look.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh god, you're going to kill me?!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, I'm just going to cripple you. Calm down.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I feel like we should aim for the instruments.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: The instruments are noncorporeal, I believe.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Are they?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They're just elevated. You didn't get a good look at them.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: One way to find out. I'm going to take a shot at the violin.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll an attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I haven't done this in so long. 17 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 17 to hit. That hits. Roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What did you aim at?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: The violin.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I aim at one of the other ones?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you want to fire at the same time?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, since he shot, I want to shoot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Which one are you shooting at, the drums?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What else was there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There was the drums, the flute, and the violin.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Drums.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll an attack for the drums.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The woods are full of Irishmen.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: 12 points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit, Flogging Molly's playing the Feywild, yo!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I rolled 16.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 16 hits, so damage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 12. And roll damage.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right. I need you to roll a survival check with advantage, leading the group forward.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I release my brother. He's out of Raven's Slumber.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Did we see a play yet?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It was the worst play I've ever seen.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's more of an intermission.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Garmelie! Why didn't you warn us that could happen?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Garmelie, who's there by the side, comes out of his invisibility, and says, "I tried! I really tried! But you guys continually insist to go face-first in whatever I warn you about, because you don't trust me, apparently, when you hired me to be your guide!"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We trust you, dear.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Hopefully you've learned a lesson! God." (sighs)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wow. That was amazing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: So the fire's out; instruments are gone. Should we loot the campfire?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We should not go back out there.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can we get those weapons, somehow?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Which weapons?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The musical weapons.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You want the magical enchanted instruments?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I guess we can't get them, can we?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Best to avoid them.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's a trap. It's not actually musical instruments.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We'll flip a coin, right, Grog?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that's it. Roll a d20.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Disadvantage. One.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Let's avoid it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We're good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So what are you guys doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We move towards the dusk.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We're moving towards the Gilded Run.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. As you guys begin moving away, Garmelie scoots up a little bit and gets a look in the edge, and goes, "Well, you certainly found the happy campsite, so good job."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, you told us about that earlier.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes! Yes, I did."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's the happy campsite.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Have you not figured that out yet?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I thought he was being metaphorical. I didn't know it was literal.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (sighs)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is quite literally the land of literalism at this point.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We make people sigh a lot.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right, you guys run, and run, and run, and you're pushing through brush and pushing over elements and heavy hard portions of the floor. I need everyone to roll-- this is going to be an athletics check for the keeping up the endurance and the speed. This is not easy terrain you continue to push through.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Grasping at what you imagine pixie blood would smell like.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'm sure it smells delightful. Herbal.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So as Keyleth, you finish concentrating, you guys watch as there's a shimmer of magical energy, and now you see where once the beautiful glowing fairy light of the pixie abodes now look burnt to a cinder. You can see embers slowly rising off of them as the stone structures are now broken across the ground.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The horror, the horror.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The pixies see it too, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: They can see it, but they can also be like: oh, this isn't real.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I grab Keyleth by the wrist and start running away from the village.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Are we running back to the lycans or to the Shademirk?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Towards the Shademirk.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I've got Garmelie.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Go, run faun, run.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But keep on the lookout for mandrakes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And werewolves.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so I want everyone to make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Strong eight.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Natural one.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Natural one.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Natural 19.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What are you looking out for? Which direction are you looking?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm looking towards where we're going.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you're going with Garmelie, heading in the direction duskward. Where are you looking, Keyleth?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm looking out for werewolves, for lycans.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Where are you looking?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm looking for lycans, too. I'm just being honest!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so you guys continue pushing forward--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm shouting  The way is clear!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You now watch as all of the various very gently falling fairy lights begin to (flitting) and be absorbed by the pixies of the forest. As their glows intensify, the purple halo growing, you see the central elder figure of the Wisher pixies say, "At least our allegiances now lie bare." I need you all to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, I cast it to my friend, who is about 12 foot tall and a giant target. Come on, don't make stories up where there aren't any.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Stories, nothing."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What? You fairies are manifesting these ideas, okay? You are creating a dichotomy that does not exist.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They all gather and begin to whisper to each other, their heads darting around.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, see, look. They're doing it right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At this point  "This display is enough. Your words and your actions speak in difference, in entirely opposing directions. If you are to continue to throw these words, these deceptions, these lies in our direction, then perhaps we'll take you all for our garden."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I wouldn't advise that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Then let us take him, and you move on with your lesson." And they go and pick him up once more.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wouldn't you rather have a song? Wouldn't you rather have-- how often do you get a performance?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I cast Hex on the main pixie.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You do?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I do.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's it, it's on. I call out to the main pixie: Wait. What's your name?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At this point, you guys watch as a shadow all of a sudden darts up from the ground and clings around the pixie. She whips around, at which point you now hear another (impact) as the stone Grog slams into the ground, all the pixies scattering around.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: See, that is what it looks like when an incantation is targeted at you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's not very nice, is it?
